items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Global oil prices drop below $105 a barrel on hopes the U.S.-Iran war will soon end
items.summary: Oil futures were extending their declines on Wednesday after President Donald Trump suggested that a deal with Iran was close, raising hopes for a resolution to the months-long stalemate in the Middle East.
items.text_it: I prezzi globali del petrolio scendono sotto i 105$ al barile nella speranza che la guerra USA-Iran finisca presto
items.summary_it: Mercoledì i futures sul petrolio hanno esteso il loro declino dopo che il presidente Donald Trump ha suggerito che un accordo con l'Iran era vicino, aumentando le speranze di una soluzione allo stallo di mesi in Medio Oriente.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Global oil prices drop below $106 a barrel on hopes that U.S.-Iran war will soon end
items.summary: Oil futures were extending their declines on Wednesday following reports that a new round of negotiations between the U.S. and Iran will be held in Pakistan, raising hopes for a resolution to the months-long stalemate in the Middle East.
items.text_it: I prezzi globali del petrolio scendono sotto i 106$ al barile nella speranza che la guerra USA-Iran finisca presto
items.summary_it: Mercoledì i futures sul petrolio hanno esteso il loro declino a seguito delle notizie secondo cui si terrà un nuovo round di negoziati tra Stati Uniti e Iran in Pakistan, aumentando le speranze di una soluzione allo stallo di mesi in Medio Oriente.

items.text: Micron’s stock gets a boost. Are Samsung’s problems helping?
items.summary: A looming strike by Samsung workers could further tighten memory supply and boost prices, analysts said.
items.text_it: Le azioni di Micron ricevono una spinta. I problemi di Samsung aiutano?
items.summary_it: Uno sciopero incombente da parte dei lavoratori Samsung potrebbe ulteriormente restringere l'offerta di memoria e aumentare i prezzi, hanno detto gli analisti.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: China Confirms It Will Buy 200 Boeing Planes
items.summary: The deal, which President Trump announced after last week’s summit, represents the largest single sale of the American company’s aircraft to Beijing in nearly a decade.
items.text_it: La Cina conferma l'acquisto di 200 aerei Boeing
items.summary_it: L'accordo, che il presidente Trump ha annunciato dopo il vertice della scorsa settimana, rappresenta la più grande vendita singola di aeromobili della compagnia americana a Pechino in quasi un decennio.

items.text: Trump’s Stock Trades Raise Eyebrows. The Family Says He Keeps His Hands Off.

items.text: Tickle Me Elmo and the ‘Elmo-Mania’ That Consumed America
items.summary: In 1996, the giggling stuffed doll turned holiday shopping into chaos, a preview of every sneaker drop, PlayStation launch and Taylor Swift ticket rush to come.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Bond Yields Hit Highest Level Since 2007 as Inflation Fears Set In
items.summary: The 30-year U.S. Treasury yield hasn’t been this high since the lead-up to the global financial crisis. Across Europe and Asia, yields are also elevated.

items.text: These charts offer a warning: A new era of higher Treasury yields may be coming
